channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird IV 2013 Vintage Sunburst — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Good · Steve's Bassyard

2013 Gibson Thunderbird IV

Overall Very Good/Good Condition- Few dings, Finish worn off on the upper cutaway, Swirling in the lacquer.

Cosmetic imperfections do not affect function

Upgrades- Has a Hipshot D-tuner and Hipshot Bridge, The original Gibson tuner is included in the case(Original Gibson case)

Plays and sounds like a Thunderbird

Thanks for looking

item.title: Fender American Series Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2002 - 2003 - 2-Color Sunburst — $1,190
item.description:
$1,190 · Excellent · J's Boutique

American Precision Series 2003 in excellent condition, comes with original hard case. Well maintained and ready to play.

This instrument has been accurately described and fully tested to ensure proper functionality. Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the item description.

Serial number and overall condition are documented prior to shipment for buyer and seller protection.

All items are professionally packed and shipped with tracking and insurance for safe delivery.

All sales are final.

Please feel free to contact me with any questions before purchasing,

I’m happy to help.

item.title: 🎸✨ HARLEY BENTON JB-75 VINTAGE SERIES – JAZZ BASS NATURELLE ✨🎸 — $119.11
item.description:
$119.11 · Good · Hunter's Shop

🌟 À vendre : Harley Benton JB-75 Vintage Series 🌟

Inspirée des Fender classic 70's Jazz Bass, elle reprend ses codes avec fidélité.

Corps en frêne massif 🪵, manche érable 🍁, touche érable avec block inlays noirs 🖤 — un look vintage qui claque (comme le slapping que vous pourrez faire avec)

🔩 Équipée de micros Wilkinson d'origine — son chaud, rond, précis 🎵

Chevalet vintage 4 selles laiton

🔧 Mécaniques vintage style clover leaf

🖤 Pickguard noir 3 plis

⚠️ État honnête — défauts à noter :

Légères traces d'utilisation sur le corps 🪵

Petite égratignure sur la plaque de fixation du manche (purement cosmétique, n'affecte pas le jeu) 🔩

📋 CARNET D'ENTRETIEN SHIVER INCLUS 📋

Dernière révision complète effectuée ✅ comprenant :

Réglage du manche (truss rod) 🔧

Réglage du chevalet & intonation 🎯

Polissage des frettes ✨

Changement complet des cordes 🎶

Nettoyage général

📦 Expédition : emballage soigné et sécurisé 🚚

🤝 Remise en main propre : la housse de transport est offerte en bonus ! 🎁🎒

item.title: USA Spector Coda PJ bass walnut — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Tetronics

As shown USA spector Coda Bass light weight at 8.30 lbs did some modifications this bass has the EMG Doug Wimbish pickup set and installed Haz clone preamp this is basically Spector Doug Wimbish bass in coda body.
Originally included Aguilar Pickups and electronics these are included if you want to take it back to stock.

Specs are below

8.30 Ibs

Natural Oil

Clairo Walnut top

Alder body

1.5" nut

Birdseye Maple board

Abalone inlays

Black side dots

Lightweight Aluminum bridge

Gold hardware

Dunlop locks

Includes deluxe Protec gig bag

item.title: G&L L-1000 1981 - blue — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Very Good · David,s Gear Depot

G&L USA 1981 L-1000 bass with Two Pickups Rare ! comes with hard shell case

item.title: Scott Signature SPORT pocket bass 2026 - Poplar — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Brand New · Scott's Strings That Sing

Fresh off the workbench of Scott Beckwith, founder of Birdsong and short scale bass specialist for almost 30 years, an "original recipe" Sport bass. Poplar body, mahogany neck, rosewood fretboard. #2603 also has chrome hardware and aged pearloid plates.

The Sport is a 25.5" scale (guitar scale length) "pocket bass" that, with Scott's know-how about short scales, performs far ahead of pocket basses of the past and even most short scales. This is a standard tuned, passive, simple, no-bull bass that is small, easy to play, and sounds huge by design.

Scott still runs Birdsong after passing the day to day building to the Head Luthier (still in TX) and now lives up in the north Adirondacks in Mooers, NY, hand building a very limited number of a few shortbass models in a hundred-year-old workshop on his 1800s homestead.

These are hand crafted instruments built on workbenches, from natural wood, with hand-rubbed oil finishes. Some natural wood marks and evidence of hand craft are to be expected. The finishing steps on each are a pro dressing and action and intonation setup, also done by Scott.

Satisfaction guaranteed, for anyone wanting the most compact bass that still works great, you're buying directly from Scott and it'll come out of the Levy's bag gig ready. Currently USA only shipping. Sbeckwith dot com is where you can read about the Sport and other models.

Thanks so much, and whatever you play, play for good and spread your music!

item.title: Fender Jaco Pastorius Artist Series Signature Fretless Jazz Bass USA G&G Case 3-Color Sunburst — $1,499.11
item.description:
$1,499.11 · Very Good · Jim Pearson Guitars

About my wonderful, CAREFULLY maintained and upkept Fender USA Jaco Pastorious Fretless Jazz Bass with wonderful factory goodies!!!!!

This bass is amazing. I still like having the lines where I can see where to place my fingers (smily face). It even has the old-style (Factory!) Third strap button on the back of the headstock. It’s designed for the old days when the long bass straps hooked up on the headstock.

I’ve recorded 6 albums with this bass as a feature on many, many instrumentals. It is unmistakable.

As a lacquer-painted instrument, it breathes wonderfully well as it ages. It also takes good care to keep it looking great. There is even a manual on care and upkeeping.

I have cared for this bass. I have played this bass for years. So, it has wear and markings from a finger-style player like me. I’m the first and only owner and player. It plays amazing and it looks great. It comes with the case goodies including the crazy-dipped chrome finish on the bridge and pickup covers. It comes with a (never installed!) Tortoise-shell pickguard.

Note: There is no warranty on this guitar from Gibson. I will, however, place a personal 2-year Jim Pearson Guitars Warranty for electronics failures to post-sale-UNMODIFIED instruments I sell.

I don’t have to sell this guitar. Low-ball offers are ignored.

Looking for one which is in excellent condition and has only been briefly adult-, studio-played? This is a great choice!

An advantage with buying an instrument or gear from me: You can purchase a used instrument which has been well-cared-for when you purchase from me.

Specifications

Accessories

Case/Gig Bag

Deluxe G&G USA! Brown Hardshell (Gold Interior)

Included Accessories

Body

Body

Select Alder

Body Finish

Gloss Lacquer

Body Material

Select Alder

Body Shape

Jazz Bass®

Electronics

Bridge Pickup

American Vintage Single-Coil Jazz Bass®

Controls

Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone

Neck Pickup

American Vintage Single-Coil Jazz Bass®

Pickup Configuration

SS

Switching

None

General

Color

3-Color Sunburst

Orientation

Right-Hand

Platform

Artist

Product Name

Jaco Pastorius Jazz Bass®, Fretless, Pau Ferro Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst

Series

Artist Signature

Hardware

Bridge

4-Saddle American Vintage Bass

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece

Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Control Knobs

Knurled Flat-Top

Hardware Finish

Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate

4-Bolt Custom

Strap Buttons

Vintage-Style

Strings

Fender® USA 9050M Stainless Steel Flatwound (.055-.105 Gauges), PN 0739050406

Tuning Machines

American Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Bass

Measurements

Fret Size

Fretless

Scale Length

34" (864 mm)

Neck

Fingerboard Material

Pau Ferro

Fingerboard Radius

12" (305 mm)

Neck Finish

Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Neck Material

Maple

Neck Shape

"C" Shape

Number of Frets

Fretless

Nut Material

Synthetic Bone

Nut Width

1.5" (38.1 mm)

Position Inlays

Side Dot

String Nut

Synthetic Bone

Truss Rod

Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

 

Shipping

At this time, I do not ship outside the United States of America. I am truly sorry. I have lost way too much money trying to do so.

Please note: I try to set shipping prices appropriately and fairly: given these factors:Any instrument sold with a case will be much heavier than just the weight of the instrument itself. Harrdshell cases are almost always much heavier than the instrument.

·       I use great boxes and lots of packing materials. This adds a lot to the shipping weight.

·       Also, using a great box means larger dimensions. The shippers can really up the price for a box the right size for an instrument.

·       I like to use UPS for my instrument shipping. Of all the shippers I’ve used in the past 25 years, UPS has done the best and has damaged the fewest of my shipments.

·       I truly can’t ship for free. Even shipping a single humbucker insured across the country costs almost $10 (as an example).

·       As my buyers come from all over the US, I set my prices as the approximate average from someone near me and someone on the west coast. I also look at the going rate charged by other sellers: this helps me see if the price I’m asking is similar to those sellers who are private sellers.

Returns

No returns: As-is:

As I am not an actual commercial factory-authorized instrument dealer, I truly can’t afford to sell instruments on an approval basis or offer free returns. I try to describe carefully and truthfully, price accordingly, and I really make a big effort to ship your new gear to you quickly and safely.

As such, my instruments are being sold as-is and without returns. The only cases where returns are allowed are when I grossly mis-describe the instrument. I ship insured and ship with Reverb protection on every instrument (even on parts and small things)! If there is a shipping issue, Reverb is awesome about helping you work out any issues which might occur.

Jim Pearson Guitars’ Story!

I enjoy recording for private contracts, and I enjoy releasing my own compositions worldwide through almost all streaming and CD sales services.

Over the past 22 years, I have released 8 experimental albums and 10 commercial Impressionistic Instrumental albums. The musical expressions and impressions I have recorded have led me to try and experiment with more than 100 different instruments. The retail instrument purchases I have made over the years has led me to build up a “library” of guitars, basses, keyboards, and many others.

The instrument in this listing was purchased by me through retail channels, including local, state, and federal taxes. I am offering this instrument because I am heading into retirement: I need to slim down to just a small subset of instruments.

What’s the advantage for you? I take incredibly good care of my instruments. I take the time to set the instruments up to my needs and specifications. I keep them clean, in a humidity- and temperature-controlled environment.

Important notes!

I liked it enough to buy it - All of us have different interpretations of “Mint” or “Excellent” or other conditions. I try to generally understate the condition, as I don’t like surprise issues any more than you do.

These might not be the droids you are looking for - “Mint” is generally, “great condition with small signs of use.” To me, Mint does not mean “superbly flawlessly correct and museum quality” just as an example.  I want us to both be happy. Ask questions: I do answer questions within the day, in general.

Remember: people make these instruments… they will have small flaws or imperfections – and that’s why I like human-made instruments! Swirls are almost always present in even expensive brand-new instruments… Typically, I use only very special cloths to maintain my instruments: I only use maintenance oils and finish conditioners which are kind to the instrument.

item.title: RARE EXCELLENT VINTAGE 1978-80 WESTBURY (MATSUMOKU JAPAN) TRACK 4 BASS GUITAR & HARD CASE L@@K — $995
item.description:
$995 · Excellent · Maconmusic

FOR SALE IS MY RARE EXCELLENT VINTAGE 1978-80 WESTBURY TRACK 4 ELECTRIC BASS GUITAR & HARD SHELL CASE. AS YOU CAN CLEARLY SEE IN THE PICS THIS BASS GUITAR IS IN EXCELLENT 100 % ORIGINAL CONDITION WITH NO ISSUES AT ALL. YOU WILL NOT FIND A CLEANER EXAMPLE OF THIS BASS GUITAR ANYWHERE GUARANTEED. THE BASS GUITAR HAS A FRESH SET UP & CLEANING WHICH INCLUDES POLISHING THE FINISH, POLISHING THE FRETS, OILING THE FRETBOARD AND INSTALLING NEW STRINGS. THE NECK IS PERFECTLY STRAIGHT, THE TRUSS ROD TURNS FREELY, THE ACTION IS NICE & LOW & THE INTONATION IS DEAD ON. THE BASS GUITAR SIMPLY LOOKS, PLAYS & SOUNDS FANTASTIC. IT IS READY TO PLAY STRAIGHT OUT OF THE BOX. JUST TUNE UP AND GO. YOU WILL NOT BE DISAPPOINTED.

(((RETURN POLICY))) MACON MUSIC STANDS BEHIND EVERYTHING WE SELL. IF FOR ANY REASON THE BUYER IS NOT SATISFIED WITH THEIR PURCHASE PLEASE CONTACT MACON MUSIC THROUGH REVERB WITHIN (3 DAYS 72 HOURS) OF RECEIVING THE INSTRUMENT TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS FOR RETURNING THE INSTRUMENT (((JUST AS IT WAS RECEIVED))) FOR A COMPLETE 100% REFUND OF THE ORIGINAL PURCHASE PRICE. (((ORIGINAL SHIPPING & INSURANCE CHARGES ARE NON REFUNDABLE AND RETURN SHIPPING & INSURANCE CHARGES ARE THE FULL RESPONSIBILITY OF THE BUYER))).

(((SHIPPING))) THE PROJECTED SHIPPING RATE IS A REVERB REGIONAL ESTIMATE. A SHIPPING LABEL BASED ON THE EXACT MEASUREMENTS AND WEIGHT WILL BE PURCHASED DIRECTLY THROUGH REVERB ONCE THE PURCHASE HAS BEEN COMPLETED. THE ACUAL SHIPPING MEASUREMENTS AND WEIGHT ARE 52x20x8 & 25 POUNDS.

item.title: Jackson X Series Concert Bass CBXDX IV M 2023 - Present - Ice Blue Metallic — $365
item.description:
$365 · Good · By Foul

Used in studio alot. Needs a new battery cover. other than that, everything works as it should


Comes with gig bag

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress P/J Bass 5-String with Maple fingerboard - Candy Apple Red — $900
item.description:
$900 · Very Good · Diogenes Devices

MetroExpress P/J 5 with an upgrade to Bartolini pickups and a Warwick white pearl pickguard. Comes with a case.

Description per the Manufacturer:

Roger Sadowsky’s goal has always been to improve on bass design by making some very unique and important enhancements. Through the use of his proprietary special electronics, light-weight tuners and selected tone wood, Roger has raised this MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 5-String Bass to a whole other level! Features include a light-weight solid Okoume body finished in Solid Candy Apple Red Metallic High Polish with a white pearl pickguard, a maple neck with a with a 1.875" / 47.5 mm wide nut, and a morado fingerboard. String spacing at the bridge is 0.71" / 18 mm and the distance between all of the strings is 2.83" / 72 mm. MetroExpress basses are the easiest way for you to access that famous Sadowsky tone: Never harsh or shrill sounding, with strong, powerful but never muddy bass, with present, but not too aggressive mids, and a sweet, airy treble.

item.title: Fender Mark Hoppus Signature "Jag" Jaguar Bass 2024 - Sea Foam Green — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Excellent · Dominic's Shop

Mark Hoppus Jag Bass Guitar in Sea Foam green. Excellent condition, played once. Comes with case as shown and strap.

item.title: Spector Euro 4 LX Haunted Moss Matte — $3,300
item.description:
$3,300 · Excellent · Rocketweezie Sales

Mint. I purchased this new in the spring and it's only been out of the gig bag twice. It has never left the house. Plays and sounds phenomenal. The last few pictures show where it appears the stain didn't completely take at the neck/ wing joints. The spots are small and barely noticeable, to me anyway.

item.title: Carvin AC50 Dark Red Acoustic/electric — $900
item.description:
$900 · Good · Diogenes Devices

Used 2010s Carvin AC50 Natural Acoustic Bass Guitar in good condition, originally featuring a chambered mahogany body--since filled in with a pickup--with flame maple top for rich, resonant tone. The 34″ scale neck offers smooth playability, paired with an ebony fingerboard and 24 frets. Equipped with Humbucker pickups and onboard preamp for tone control, this versatile 5-string bass delivers warm, balanced sound ideal for both stage and studio. When I bought this it had been modified with a magnetic pickup. Great neck, plays good, have to thin the herd.

item.title: MTD Kingston Super V Modified — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Excellent · Clifford's Boutique

Up for sale is my MTD Kingston Super 5 V2 5-string bass. This bass is in excellent condition and has been professionally upgraded well beyond the stock specification, making it a versatile instrument capable of covering virtually any musical style.

This instrument was professionally modified by a previous owner and includes several premium upgrades that significantly expand its tonal capabilities.

Upgrades & Features

  • Nordstrand Big Blademan pickups
  • Mike Pope Flexcore 18V 4-band preamp
  • 2Tek bridge upgrade
  • Series / Parallel / Single Coil switching for both pickups
  • High Mid and Low Mid frequency selector switches
  • Professionally routed and shielded electronics cavity
  • Dual 9V battery operation
  • Tele-style output jack upgrade
  • Buzz Feiten tuning system

Excellent condition overall. Everything functions exactly as it should. The bass plays great, sounds incredible, and has been well cared for.

Bass will be professionally packed and fully insured for shipment.


Please feel free to reach out with any questions or requests for additional photos.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4H 3EQ USA~ Honey Burst~ 2000 + Case 🇺🇸 — $2,061.20
item.description:
$2,061.20 · Good · Chordplay Guitars

🇺🇸 2000 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4H 3EQ USA Honey Burst~ Matching Headstock~ Original Hard Case🇺🇸 


A fantastic USA-built Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4H finished in stunning Honey Burst, complete with its original Music Man hard case and featuring the sought-after factory matching headstock.


According to the original factory build records, this StingRay was manufactured on 6th July 2000 at the Ernie Ball Music Man factory in San Luis Obispo, California. The matching headstock was a factory option from new and is a feature you don’t often see on StingRays from this era.


The StingRay has earned its reputation as one of the most iconic basses ever made. Its powerful Music Man humbucker and active 3-band EQ deliver everything from deep, punchy lows to crisp highs and that unmistakable StingRay attack. Whether you’re playing rock, funk, pop or anything in between, it has the versatility and presence that has made it a favourite of countless professional players.


The bass plays great and all electronics function exactly as they should.


Condition


Overall, this is a very honest example of a 26-year-old USA instrument.


There are the expected light marks, small dings and signs of use commensurate with its age, all of which can be seen in the photographs.


As is common on many Music Man instruments from this period, there are several lacquer cracks and finish checks. Most notably, there is an area on the rear of the body and a smaller area on the front where the lacquer had lifted and has previously been carefully glued back down to prevent it lifting further.


To be completely clear, this is NOT a crack in the wood and is not a structural repair. It is purely within the lacquer finish.


None of these affect the playability or functionality of the instrument.


Please study the photographs carefully as they form part of the description.


Specification


* Made in USA

* Manufactured 6th July 2000

* Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4H

* Honey Burst finish

* Factory matching painted headstock

* Ash body

* Maple neck

* Maple fingerboard

* 34” scale length

* 21 frets

* Music Man Alnico humbucking pickup

* Active 3-band EQ

* Chrome hardware

* Original Ernie Ball Music Man hard case included


A superb USA StingRay with a lovely honest patina, a desirable factory specification and that unmistakable Music Man tone. These early 2000s USA examples continue to be highly regarded and are becoming increasingly difficult to find, particularly with the matching headstock.


What’s Included


This bass is supplied with its Ernie Ball Music Man hard case, as shown in the photographs.


Cases and gig bags are only included where clearly shown in the photographs or specifically mentioned within the listing description.


Why Buy From Chordplay Guitars?


• Independent UK guitar specialist based in Darwen, Lancashire

• Over 200 new and used guitars in stock

• Open 7 days a week, including Bank Holidays

• Free next working day UK delivery on orders over £470

• Part exchange and trade-ins always welcome

• £50 deposit secures any guitar

• International shipping available

• First guitar? Ask about our starter packs from just £99

• Visit our website to browse our full range and view additional photographs.


International Buyers


Please note that any import duties, taxes and customs charges are the responsibility of the buyer. These charges vary by country and are not included in the purchase price or shipping costs.

item.title: Squier Bullet Bass B-34 1983 - 3-Color Sunburst — $799
item.description:
$799 · Very Good · J's Boutique

Japanese Fender Squier Bullet Bass in great playing condition. Always carefully stored in a hard case (not included). Comes with a Fender gig bag. It has a few minor dents and light cosmetic marks, but nothing that affects playability—overall a clean,

item.title: Squier Precision PJ Bass Body - Lake Placid Blue — $245
item.description:
$245 · Excellent · Ground Squirrel Customs And Repair

Like new Squier Precision PJ bass loaded body. Everything works. Beautiful condition!

item.title: 1983 Yamaha BB1200 Bass — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Very Good · JJ’s Bassment

1983 Yamaha BB1200 Bass for sale. It’s the passive version of the first Yamaha bass that Peter Hook played with Joy Division/ New Order. The bass is in great shape with minor scratches and play wear. All original. Truss works perfectly. Will not come with a case, but will be packed and shipped carefully. All questions welcomed, and I only ship within the US. Thanks for looking!

item.title: 2000 Raven PJ Bass – Candy Apple Red Metallic – Made in Korea — $399
item.description:
$399 · Very Good · Dimma's Guitar Sanctuary

2000 Raven PJ Bass – Candy Apple Red Metallic – Made in Korea (Samick/Cort)

Up for sale is a sharp, excellent-playing Raven 4-String PJ Bass in a gorgeous Candy Apple Red Metallic finish. Built in April 2000 in South Korea (likely out of the legendary Samick or Cort factories), this bass offers fantastic build quality, stability, and versatility that easily rivals entry-level Ibanez Soundgear or Cort models.

Key Features & Specs:

  • Production Origin: Made in South Korea (Serial: 00040932 — April 2000)
  • Body Style: Lightweight, ergonomic dual-cutaway body with deep contours—incredibly comfortable to play sitting or standing.
  • Pickup Configuration: Classic P/J setup (Split-coil in the middle, Jazz single-coil at the bridge) giving you the punch of a Precision bass and the growl of a Jazz bass.
  • Electronics: 4-knob control layout for independent volume and tone shaping.
  • Hardware: Reliable 2x2 chrome tuners and a high-mass style adjustable bridge for great sustain.
  • Neck: Sleek, fast satin-finish neck with a rosewood fingerboard. P

Condition:

The bass is in beautiful, clean cosmetic and structural condition with bright chrome hardware and a vibrant metallic finish. It has been well-cared for by previous owner and is ready to plug in and play.

Neck and body cleaned and lubed. Stings are perfect.

It ships with hard case. Case has cracks and missing one latch but still holds and survive shipping.

Ships fast CONUS states


PLEASE NOTE:

This is a pre-owned / used guitar and is being sold as-is. Please expect normal signs of use consistent with a previously owned instrument, including but not limited to minor scratches, dents, finish marks, surface wear, oxidation, discoloration, or other cosmetic imperfections that may not be individually photographed or specifically described.

I do my best to accurately describe and photograph the item’s condition, but small cosmetic details can be overlooked. Any major damage or functional issues known to me will be clearly disclosed in the listing.

By purchasing this item, the buyer acknowledges that used instruments will show some degree of wear and agrees that minor cosmetic imperfections are not grounds for return, partial refund, or dispute.

Please review all photos carefully and ask any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Natasha NBSG Bass(Mahogany) — $429
item.description:
$429 · Very Good · IJ’s Shop

I’m selling my Natasha NBSG Mahogany Smart Bass. It’s an incredibly versatile instrument perfect for travel, home recording, and quiet practice.

One of the best things about this bass is its triple connectivity:

 Standard 1/4" (55) Jack: Plug straight into any traditional bass amp or pedalboard.

 Wireless Connection: Comes with the included wireless receiver for cable-free playing.

 USB-C Output: Connect directly to your phone, tablet, or PC for easy recording or digital audio output.

Condition: Very Good. It has a few minor dings from normal use (see photos), but it is fully functional and plays beautifully.

Included: Original gig bag, wireless receiver, charging cable, and all original accessories.

item.title: B.C. Rich Innovator 5 String Bass Active EMG HZ 2011 - Amber Flame — $485
item.description:
$485 · Very Good · Golden Tone

Very good condition excellent build quality active electronics EMG pickups nice amber finish. New battery, I like my strings older so if you like brand new strings you’ll have to put your own on, these sound great full and low down so try them before replacing anything. Very little play wear throughout including on the frets, really needs nothing immediately. Includes padded gig bag.

item.title: 1977 Fender Precision Bass - Rosewood Fretboard — $2,068.10
item.description:
$2,068.10 · Fair · Fuzz Cottage

Here's a fun one!

As far as I know, before I owed it, a musician from Africa played it all his life... and its had quite a ride.. plays and sounds phenomenal despite its battered appearance.

Original finish was sunburst - the past owner sanded it down.. without taking any of the parts off... so as you can see, all plastics are scratched and show the evidence of sanding. If you remove the plastics you can see the old finish. You can spot some of the old sunburst by the bridge, where he just sanded around it.

The neck is lovely, and the patina has got so heavy, it makes it look almost like an old clay dot fretboard. The finish has also been sanded on the back of the neck, and a marker pen was used to mark where the fret dots are on the side. Probably easy to clean, I just left them be.

Original pickup and electronics. Only refloated some of the solder to strengthen some loose connections when I got it.

Original tuners, strap buttons, bridge cover, knobs and pickguard.

You can still see the Fender logo under the really weathered finish, and the serial number reads S7(4 or 1?)7709 under the right light. Hope the photos show them ok!

Despite its looks, this thing is amazing. I'm a guitar player first, and I find it easy to play when I have to pretend I'm a bassist!

No case, it came as it is - so collection from SW London would be preferable. Although if you really want it shipped, contact me and we'll figure something out.

Make me an offer!

item.title: Stradi Symphony The Dorado Fretless 6 string — $7,743.04
item.description:
$7,743.04 · Excellent · Davin 's Gear Garage

In the process of talking about a fretted bass, a cool top, and other options, Marek shared a photo of the basses he was taking to NAMM. I just drooled over this Maple Burl on top of Black Limba with a fretted Purpleheart board. Other aspects include Evo gold frets, Delano HE, and Glockenklang 3 band pre. Of course,

item.title: Squier Affinity Jazz Bass V — $275.75
item.description:
$275.75 · Fair · Luke’s Basses

Bought this one around 3 years ago, used fairly often, tiny scratches not visible to naked eye, last strings change over 6 months ago.

item.title: Hagstrom Viking Bass 2010s - Black — $550
item.description:
$550 · Good · Jake

Clean and plays great! The tone switch is a little bit scratchy but works good. Love this bass. Low end is smooth. No case.

item.title: Peavey T-40 with Maple Fretboard 1981 - Natural — $825
item.description:
$825 · Very Good · Damon's Surplus Gear

Up for sale is a classic 1981 Peavey T-40 in the sought-after natural finish with a one-piece maple neck and fretboard. This USA-made tank of a bass is in very good condition for its age, showing only light cosmetic wear, minor dings, and surface scratches consistent with normal use, but nothing that affects playability or function.

The T-40 is famous for its versatile electronics, featuring dual humbuckers with coil-splitting via the tone controls, allowing everything from deep Precision-style thump to bright Jazz-style grind. It sounds massive, with that unmistakable vintage Peavey punch.

Weight is a hefty 11 lbs 10 oz—right in line with what these are known for, giving it excellent sustain and authority. Includes the original Peavey “chainsaw” hard case, which is in solid working condition and a collectible piece in its own right.

A true vintage workhorse and one of the best values in USA-made basses from the era. Perfect for players, collectors, or anyone chasing that old-school T-40 tone.

item.title: ESP LTD Surveyor 415 - Black - MINT CONDITION — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · Derek's Gear Depot

ESP LTD Surveyor 415!

This is the one with the factory active EMG's.

This bass is in excellent condition. I couldn't find a flaw on the body and the headstock has minor clear coat scratches from putting strings on it (tried to photo best I could). Has some nice maple figuring on the neck.

Everything works as it should and this is about as close to brand new as you will find.

Comes in the factory ESP cardboard box and will be packaged well.

item.title: Electrical Guitar Company Brian Cook Signature 34" Scale Series 2 Bass — $3,600
item.description:
$3,600 · Excellent · Scott's Gear Locker

Lightly used Electrical Guitar Company Brian Cook signature Series 2 bass. Full aluminum construction, body is powder coated black, pickguard is gloss black powder coated aluminum and rear of body is texture powder coated. Polished 34” scale neck. Two high gain EGC humbuckers. 2 volume, 2 tone, 3 way switch. Comes with hard shell case.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo 5 HH 2025 Blood Orange — $2,400
item.description:
$2,400 · Excellent · Giorgi's Gear Outlet

Original owner since June 2025.

Plays, sounds and feels just great. I think it looks great as well.

There is nothing wrong with it, no dings or scratches that I can find.

Comes with everything it came with.

Shipping box: 58x23x10, 24 pounds

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 Active 5-String Bass 2010s - See-Thru Black Satin — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Tony's Gear Outlet

Schecter Stiletto Extreme 5 Bass Guitar Features:

  • Mahogany body with gorgeous figured maple top will attract eyes and ears
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 24X Jumbo frets plays smoothly 
  • Schecter tuners and Diamond Bridge ensure excellent intonation 
  • Schecter Diamond Bass pickups output growl to clean to everything in between
  • Volume, blend, and 2-band EQ to further contour your sound
  • Thin "C"-shaped neck feels great in the hand

item.title: Steinberger Spirit XT-2DB Standard - Black — $549
item.description:
$549 · Excellent · Richard's Gear Locker

The XT-2DB Standard 4-string bass features the revolutionary Steinberger design with a Basswood body and 3-piece Hard Maple neck that together resonate as a single piece of wood. This bass was bought to use as a travel bass, and it did the job perfectly! The XT-2DB is the Ultimate Travel Bass™. At 38.5” long and only 7.5lbs, its ergonomic design makes it easy to take anywhere including overhead airline compartments. And thanks to its headless construction and 3-piece Hard Maple neck, the XT-2DB isn’t as sensitive to temperature changes, which makes it virtually indestructible!

The XT-2DB Standard 4-string Bass Outfit features the DB-Tuner™ System for instant drop tuning of the low E-string to D plus the incredibly accurate Direct Pull tuning system which features a 40:1 tuning ratio. Steinberger basses are renowned for their exceptional tone and intonation, even when using the DB-Tuner™ System. With no headstock, the XT-2DB has a Zero Nut Fret with a width of 1.50” that moves up to 2.156” at the 12th fret as the neck subtly widens to 0.70” string spacing at the bridge. The Patented DoubleBall™ Bass Bridge with steel saddle provides exceptional stability and sustain. Without a headstock, the weight of the XT-2DB feels more balanced than a typical electric bass. Fine tuning adjustments are made at the bridge and string changes can be made fast! The Steinberger XT-2DB is set up at the factory with Steinberger DoubleBall™ (45-65-85-105) strings. Plus, with the Single Ball String Adopter, you can set also set up the XT-2DB with any bass string of your choice.  

The Steinberger XT-2DB Standard is powered by Steinberger full tone HB-1 (bridge) and HB-2 (neck) humbucker pickups. Controls feature black Steinberger style knobs for Neck Pickup Volume, Bridge Pickup Volume, and Master Tone.

This bass comes with both the optional Steinberger hard case and the standard deluxe padded gig bag.  The hard case has a few dings and blemishes courtesy of normal airport baggage handling, but is fully functional and protects the bass flawlessly.  

Specifications

Finish: Gloss Black

Neck Material: 3-pc Hard Maple

Body Material: Basswood

Neck Shape: 1960's SlimTaper™; D profile

Fingerboard Material: Engineered Hardwood

Fingerboard: Radius 14"

Frets: 24; Medium-Jumbo

Scale Length: 34"

Zero Nut Width: 1.50"

12th Fret Width: 2.156"

Tuning System: DB-Tuner Drop Tuning System with Patented 40:1 Direct Pull

Bridge: Patented DoubleBall™ Bass Bridge

Saddle Material: Steel

Bridge String Spacing: 0.70"

Neck Pickup: Steinberger Bass HB-2

Bridge Pickup: Steinberger Bass HB-1


Controls:

Neck Pickup Volume

Bridge Pickup Volume

Master Tone 

Hardware: Black

Output Jack: Premium 1/4" Barrel-Style

Strings: Steinberger DoubleBall™ 45-65-85-105


Other: Fold Down/Up Leg Rest

Weight: 7.5 lbs

Length: 38.5"

item.title: Squier Precision Bass 2000s - Black — $215
item.description:
$215 · Good · 2313's Gear Outlet

It’s been played. See photos

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-6 Active 6-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $670
item.description:
$670 · Very Good · Joshs Gear

Very solid bass! Would need to be set up with new strings as it is not played much. only real blemishes are on tuning pegs the clear coat is peeling

item.title: 90s Hohner Professional HZA Jazz Bass — $450
item.description:
$450 · Very Good · KBH

90s Hohner Professional Series HZA jazz bass, made in Kores, Flamed maple top in Walnut Stain with gold hardware with a cream pickguard. Originally active, the preamp was damaged so I wired it up passive with Fender pickups and a passive wiring harness. I will be including the active preamp and pickups. The bass plays great and build quality is great. There's plenty of room in the cavity of you want to install an aftermarket preamp and pickups to customize it to your preferences.

The logo on the headstock was removed and there appears to be someone's faded autograph on the headstock and the word Shine but i can't tell who's it is. Other than that it's a solidly built and playing instrument that plays way above its pay grade.

Specs:

Scale Length: 34"

Nut Width: 1 5/8"

Weight: 9.12 lbs

Finish Color: Walnut Stain

Pickup/Control Layout: Two Single Coil Pickups, VVT

Neck Wood: Maple

Fingerboard Wood: Maple

Features: 20 Frets, Black Dot Inlays, Gold Hardware, Bolt-On Neck

Padded gigbag

item.title: PureSalem La Flaca - Purple Burst — $715
item.description:
$715 · Brand New · Rick's Gear Locker

This is a brand new PureSalem La Flaca Bass. I own PureSalem and this is my personal Reverb page where I sometimes sell PureSalem gear that is neither old stock, used or on clearance besides my personal gear purchases and sales.


This is a killer bass with a fast skinny neck. If you have small hands you will love this bass. It sounds amazing and takes fuzz pedals like a champ. See my other listings for more color options.

The German carve is beautiful and really adds to the look.

TECH SPECS

  • Body Shape: La Flaca with German carve
  • Head Shape: La Flaca with German carve
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Neck Color: Natural Satin
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Shape: Thin C
  • Joint Type: 4-Bolt On
  • Radius: 9.5
  • Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Inlay: Block
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Scale Length: 32
  • Nut Width: 1-1/2” (38mm)
  • Nut Material: Black Graphite nut
  • Bridge: Custom Bass String Through or Top Load
  • Pickup: Traditional
  • Electronic: 3 way toggle switch, 1 tone, 1 volume
  • Tuners: PureSalem Custom
  • Colors: Metallic White, Poly Natural Stain, Purple Burst, Opal Black

item.title: Guyatone Ideal 1965 - Sunburst — $477.93
item.description:
$477.93 · Fair · Gear Of This World

Guyatone Ideal Bass — circa 1964-1967, Fully Restored

Vintage Japanese Guyatone Ideal bass, dating approximately 1964-1967. Rare collector’s piece, carefully restored over several months.


Restoration work completed:

• Complete strip of original nitro finish on the neck

• Brushed aluminum pickguard (acetone-stripped + hand-sanded)

• Goldfoil pickup corrected: split ferrite magnet re-aligned to opposite polarity for a clean tone, no phase cancellation

• Original Cosmos Tokyo potentiometers cleaned, fully functional with no scratchiness

• Frets leveled (full fret leveling) — no buzz, even plugged in

• New strings installed (Ernie Ball Hybrid Slinky 45-105, Eb tuning)

• Action adjusted, neck relief currently spot-on.

Important — full transparency:

The truss rod has reached the end of its mechanical adjustment range. This is a permanent characteristic of this particular instrument, not a defect that will develop later — the current relief is stable and the neck plays well as set up, but there’s no further room for adjustment. Neck profile is generous/substantial, in the spirit of vintage ’60s basses.

Tone and character: Full and bassy, very true to the era — great for ambient, sonic exploration, or any style chasing that authentic vintage grain.

Great for: ambient/experimental music, vintage character tone, Guyatone collectors, or fans of rare 1960s Japanese basses.

item.title: PureSalem La Flaca Bass - Natural Stain — $715
item.description:
$715 · Brand New · Rick's Gear Locker

This is a brand new PureSalem La Flaca Bass. I own PureSalem and this is my personal Reverb page where I sometimes sell PureSalem gear that is neither old stock, used or on clearance besides my personal gear purchases and sales.


This is a killer bass with a fast skinny neck. If you have small hands you will love this bass. It sounds amazing and takes fuzz pedals like a champ. See my other listings for more color options.

item.title: Surine Esprit 5 string 2022 w/custom inlays! — $4,400
item.description:
$4,400 · Excellent · The Gear Is Here

Here’s my Surine Custom 5 string with custom inlays and a stunning cocobolo top!
I’m not the original owner.
This bass is a beauty and as stunning as they come and built like a tank. The Bartolini p/ups and preamp, combined with these particular woods, give this bass a fat juicy tone with every tone option possible.
Sorry for the reflections in the pics.
Im not sure of the other woods used in this build.
The custom inlays on this are really stunning. On the tips of each inlay there is a dark red in the design that’s very subtle but awesome.
There's only two noticeable cosmetic imperfections I can see, they‘re in the two pics at my fingertip. They're only surface level.
Bass is in excellent condition and ready for YOU! Ships CONTUS only in a lightly used padded gig bag. Flat shipping rate. Sold as-is, no returns.
Thanks for looking

All specs below-


Features 
Body Core
Honduras Mahogany (Other Woods Upon Request)Ships CONTUS only in a lightly used padded gig bag. Flat shipping rate. Sold as-is, no returns.
Thanks for looking!

Body Caps
.25” Cocobolo

Body Veneers 
Contrasts Body Cap Wood Species

Headdplate
Matches Body Wing Wood Species

Brand Identification 
Mother of Pearl Inlay Logo + Name Decal

Fingerboard –
Ebony
– Fretted: 24 Medium Gauge Frets
– Fretless: 24 Position Unlined or Lined
– Mother of Pearl Dot Position Markers
– Compound Radius: 17″- 22″

Neck
NTVII 7-Piece: Rock Maple Core, Walnut Stringers
NTIII 3-Piece: Rock Maple Core, Walnut Stringer
NTII 2-Piece: Rock Maple Neck

Electronics

– NTCT Preamp – 9 Volt Battery
– Neck Pickup Volume + Push/Pull Preamp On/Off

Gotoh

Nut
Brass

Control Knobs Brass (Black or Gold)

Hipshot

Black Anodized Aluminum with Recessed Logo

Finish
– Clear Gloss Polyester
– TruOil

item.title: Yamaha TRBX305 5-String Bass 2020s - Black — $400
item.description:
$400 · Good · Brian's Gear Locker

Yamaha TRBX305 5-String bass in solid condition. Recently restrung and set up with D'Addario XT 45-130s. Also including Dunlop strap locks and a fender gig bag. Some minor scratches throughout the finish and the hardware has some minor oxidation but no major ding, dents, cracks, or blemishes.

item.title: Steinberger Spirit XT-2DB Standard 2010s - Black — $514.91
item.description:
$514.91 · Excellent · Roald's Gear

Bought but played on it twice and realised this bass is nothing for me.

Right handed + 4 string + official Steinberger bag

item.title: Sterling By Music Man Joe Dart II 2025 - Black — $699
item.description:
$699 · Excellent · The Darrenbass Collection

Sterling by Music Man Joe Dart II Bass made in 2025, fairly limited production in this finish, really great condition, rarely played, 34" scale, passive electronics, comes with factory gig bag, weight is 9 lbs 7 oz, original flat wound strings are still on it.

item.title: Framus 5/150 Star Bass De Luxe "Stone Bass" 1961 - 1971 - Red — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Joe's Gear Locker

1965 Framus 5/150 excellent original condition with original locking case

item.title: Sterling Joe Dart I Bass First Crop 2024 - Natural — $599
item.description:
$599 · Excellent · The Darrenbass Collection

Sterling by Music Man Joe Dart Bass from the first year 2024, excellent condition, rarely played, original flat wound strings still on it, 34” scale, passive electronics, plays and sounds great! Weighs 8 lbs 6 oz, one super tiny ding near the end of the neck.

item.title: 2025 Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass V 5-string — $1,275
item.description:
$1,275 · Excellent · Bass Boutique

This bass guitar was purchased new from Sweetwater in March, 2026. It is super lightweight (8.75lb), which is extremely rare in a five string Fender jazz.


This lightweight beauty has seen very little action, played mostly in my home studio. It is in great shape. I would say it’s like-new, but there is a small nick near the lower bout. Because of that mark, I’ve dropped the price to make this a hard deal to pass up


The neck is perfect. The action is low. And it plays and sounds just like a jazz bass should. Killer instrument and great deal.


Ships in the original hardshell case.


CONUS only / No trades please.

item.title: Persian Ukelele Bass - Natural — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Cambalucho

This u Bass is in very good condition, some mínimum scratches and dings for the use.

For international shipping we have to check the exactly price.

Feel free to make an offer or to ask what you want to know about it

item.title: Delph Penetrator Ultimate 5 PM — $2,501.60
item.description:
$2,501.60 · Mint · Delph handcrafted instruments

Delph handcrafted 5 string bass

Body: American Pine

Finish: Puple Mist, matte, matching headstock

Neck: 3 piece, roasted ash/jatoba/roasted ash

Fingerboard: Wenge, Glow in the dark inlays, white plastic side dot inlays

Pickups: EMG J 5

Electronics: EMG BQC system, Volume, Balance, Bass/treble stacked, Mid/variable Mid frequency.

Tuners: Gotoh GB-707

Bridge: Gotoh 404-BO 5

Nut: Brass, 45mm

Scale: 33"

Weight: 4.0kg

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Precision bass 2008 - Amber — $1,667.73
item.description:
$1,667.73 · Good · Delph handcrafted instruments

Bass in very good condition, nicely setup with low action, minor dings and scratches shown in pictures, all original condition with original hardshell case, very light and comfortable 3.7kg, nicely balanced thanks to original Hipshot ultralight tuners. Electronics work great, middle knob has slight sign of wear, weak center detent, but works fine.

Body Select Alder

Bridge Deluxe Chrome Plated (Strings-Thru-Body or Top Load) with Nickel Plated Brass Saddles

Bridge Pickup Humbucker

Controls Master Volume, Pan Control, Three-Band Active EQ with Treble Boost/Cut, Bass Boost/Cut and Mid Boost/Cut

Fingerboard Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm)

Fret Size Medium Jumbo

Hardware Finish Chrome

Middle Pickup Split Single-Coil Precision Bass®

Model Name American Deluxe Precision Bass® (2004-2010), Rosewood Fingerboard, Amber

Neck Finish Satin Urethane

Neck Material Maple

Neck Shape Modern "C"

Number of Frets 22

Nut Material Bone

Nut Width 1.625" (41.3 mm)

item.title: Fender American Series Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2001 - 2007 - Black — $881
item.description:
$881 · Good · Danielle's Gear Garage

2007 American std P bass. Some small scuffs and a chip shown in photos, but otherwise it is good condition.

item.title: Squier Affinity Precision Bass PJ 2022 Charcoal Frost Metallic — $205
item.description:
$205 · Very Good · Dimma's Guitar Sanctuary

This one is Solid VG condition work horse of a bass guitar.

It hash basic handling marks like buckle rush, small dings, and other minor cosmetic imperfections,

Fully functional electronics. Fretboard and body cleaned. Set to play out of the box. Please note tone control knob is aftermarket.

It will ship fast CONUS states

Model Info Below:

The Precision Bass PJ joins Squier’s popular Affinity Series to bring affordable Fender style to aspiring bassists. Revamped for the beginning player, the Affinity Series Precision Bass is built with a slim, lightweight body and a thin C neck for a supremely comfortable feel. A standard split single-coil in the neck and an extra single-coil in the bridge, both newly voiced for character and balance, provide a wide tonal range to explore. With vintage-style open-gear tuners and a 4-saddle bass bridge, this entry-level PJ bass guitar makes classic Fender design available to players of all budgets. A true value regardless of skill set, the Affinity Series Precision Bass is now available at Guitar Center.
Squier Affinity Precision Bass Main Features

  • Thin, playable C neck profile
  • Dual single-coil pickup configuration
  • Traditional open-gear tuners
  • Elegant Squier headstock

Comfortably Designed Modern NeckThe Squier Affinity PJ Bass is made with a slim and playable neck, perfect for learning the fundamentals of bass guitar. A modern C neck profile offers a comfortable feel for most playing styles.
Two Versatile P/J Single CoilsIn addition to the traditional split single-coil Precision Bass pickup included on the P Bass, the Affinity Series PJ Bass adds on an extra single-coil Jazz Bass bridge pickup. Each pickup has its own Volume control with a Master Tone to fine-tune the output.
Vintage Style TunersSome things are perfect just the way they are and that includes the open-gear vintage-style tuning machines on the Squier Precision PJ Bass. These open-gear tuners keep strings reliably in tune, provide easy adjustments and add an extra touch of class.
Two-Color Headstock LogoSpeaking of classy details, the Affinity Series Precision Bass also includes an updated headstock. An elegant gold and black Squier logo is the perfect final touch to this affordable yet beautifully crafted instrument.

The Squier Affinity Series Precision Bass PJ is priced for beginners but built to become a reliable go-to instrument that always feels comfortable to play. A P/J pickup configuration and a fast-playing, slim neck ensure the Affinity Series Bass delivers a variety of tones from meaty to crisp with minimal hand fatigue, even after hours of practice. There’s no better way to learn bass guitar than with Fender looks and classic P Bass tone.
